ItacPersonItem.Notes: A member of the Infuriati Academy in Naples (not mentioned by Maylender). For Quaranta`s affiliation to the Infuriati Academy see Gio. Battista Bergazzano, Le Varie Fortune, Naples, 1637.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
